Description: Navigate to https://silfratech.in/miraq-expense-claim, and in the users click on Priya Mehta and then in Legacy and MiraQ option choose MiraQ and then click on 'I want to claim expense' and wait for a second and then add something similar to this 'On 2 March 2026 spent 800 on cab to airport, Ate lunch of 200 today then yesterday booked a cab for 500, Two days ago spent 300 on fuel and day before yesterday hotel 1200, Fuel for bike 500, parking charges 100' and then wait for second and click on the skip button in next chat message and in the chat input type 'confirm' and click on send button
